category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides tools for the WireGuard secure network tunnel; official WireGuard repositories page describes wireguard-tools as userspace tools for wg and wg-quick.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is wireguard-tools; official WireGuard repositories page lists the project as wireguard-tools.
docs_sources: Official WireGuard site provides Quick Start, compilation, and official repositories pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official WireGuard repositories and compilation pages identify git.zx2c4.com/wireguard-tools as the wireguard-tools source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists wg and wg-quick; source_facts.description identifies WireGuard secure network tunnel tooling.
